rulesets.name: classic_static_30d
rulesets.description: Fixed target with static max loss, realized daily limit, and 30 traded-day expiry.
rulesets.notes: Stylized fixed-drawdown evaluation; daily rule is enforced on realized daily PnL only.

rulesets.name: trailing_strict_35d
rulesets.description: Fixed target with end-of-day trailing drawdown, daily limit, and 35 traded-day expiry.
rulesets.notes: Trailing floor = peak equity minus trailing allowance, updated on end-of-day realized equity.

rulesets.name: static_permissive_45d
rulesets.description: Fixed target with wider static max loss, no daily limit, and 45 traded-day expiry.
rulesets.notes: Useful to test whether the hierarchy changes once daily stop pressure is relaxed.
